description:
Search Unity assets in the pre-built index. Use this to find prefabs, scenes, materials, textures, scripts, animations, etc.

Query syntax: space-separated predicates, AND semantics between predicates. Wrap predicate values in double quotes when they contain spaces, e.g. 'n:"Point Light"'. Use \" and \| for literal quotes and pipes.
IMPORTANT: Use | (pipe) within ANY predicate value for OR semantics. Pipes split OR values only outside quoted text. This works for BOTH type and name fields. Always combine related types/names into a single call instead of making separate calls.
Example: 't:prefab|script n:player|hero' searches prefabs AND scripts whose name contains 'player' or 'hero' — in ONE call.

All name predicates (n=, n^, n$, n:) are CASE-INSENSITIVE.

Supported predicates:
  t:<type|type2>   — filter by asset type (OR with pipe)
  n=<name|name2>   — exact filename match, case-insensitive (OR with pipe)
  n^<pfx|pfx2>     — filename starts with, case-insensitive (OR with pipe)
  n$<sfx|sfx2>     — filename ends with, case-insensitive (OR with pipe)
  n:<sub|sub2>     — filename contains substring, case-insensitive (OR with pipe)
  under:<pathPfx>  — asset path starts with prefix (e.g. 'Assets/UI')
  guid:<guid>      — exact GUID match (32-hex)

Asset types: scene, prefab, material, animation, animatorController, genericAsset, script, texture, audio, shader, model, otherYaml, metaOnly

Examples:
  't:prefab under:Assets/UI'                      — all prefabs under Assets/UI
  't:scene'                                        — all scenes
  't:prefab n:Player|Protagonist|Character|Hero'   — prefabs with name containing any of the terms
  't:prefab n:PointLight|"Point Light"'           — prefabs with either compact or spaced names
  't:prefab|scene'                                 — all prefabs and scenes
  't:material n:Metal'                              — materials containing 'Metal' in name

Output format: plain text, one line per result.
First line is always: total:<N> showing:<start>-<end>
Subsequent lines: field values separated by tab, one result per line.
When `tp` is requested, ScriptableObject-style `genericAsset` results render as `ClassName(genericAsset)`.
Default fields: p (path only). Request more with 'fields' param.
Pass range '0' to return only the total count.
- When Headroom is enabled and output exceeds the compress threshold, large result lists are compressed through headroom-ai (requires headroom proxy or HEADROOM_API_KEY).

q.description: Query string with space-separated predicates. Quote values that contain spaces. Example: 't:prefab under:Assets/UI n:"Point Light"'

range.description: Row range as '<start>-<end>' (1-indexed, max 200 rows). Examples: '1-20' (first 20), '21-40' (next 20), '0' (count only). Default: '1-20'.

fields.description: Fields per result line (tab-separated). Fewer fields = fewer tokens. Available: tp, n, p, guid. `tp` shows `ClassName(genericAsset)` for ScriptableObject assets when indexed script metadata is available.
